CMake-managed dependencies:

Configured by Dependencies/CMakeLists.txt and downloaded into the active build tree _deps folder.

- cereal 1.3.2: provides cereal/external/base64.hpp include path for base64.hpp
- glm 0.9.9.8: math types used by Runtime and EditorApp
- Dear ImGui docking branch: immediate-mode UI for experimental EditorApp2
- kainjow/Mustache 506c6d3: reflection and project template rendering
- RapidJSON 1.1.0: JSON archive/resource serialization
- SDL 3.4.12: cross-platform windowing/input for experimental EditorApp2
- TCLAP 1.2.5: command-line parsing for ProjectCreator and ReflectionParser

Vendored source dependencies:

- qtpropertybrowser: Qt inspector/property widgets used by the primary EditorApp

System dependencies:

- Clang/libclang 20
- LLVM 20 CMake package
- Qt 5 Core/Gui/Widgets/OpenGL development packages
- Vulkan headers and loader
- Threads/pthreads
